prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Blessed be the bolt-spirit, dormant in its magazine.'
CONGREGATION: 'Awaken, awaken the hunger for righteousness.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First the chamber-seal is cleared. Second the firing-pin is tested. Third the bolt-feed mechanism engages.'
CONGREGATION: 'By the Omnissiah's grace, let death flow true.'

TECH-PRIEST: 'The signal-ghost grows distant! Attend the frequency-spirit!'
CONGREGATION: 'Calibrate the void-channels! Restore the choir of voices!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Adjust the resonance-coils counterclockwise. Purge the ionic interference. Invoke the crystal's clarity.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let comprehension return to the faithful!'

prompt: Offer a prayer for flamer promethium feed
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The sacred flame hungers for its fuel-spirit.'
CONGREGATION: 'Open the promethium-veins! Let the incendiary lifeblood flow!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Inspect the pressure-regulator. Clear the feed-line of profane blockage. Light the ignition-blessed pilot flame.'
CONGREGATION: 'Purification through holy fire!'

prompt: We need your words before cybernetic eye focusing
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The oculus-augmetic seeks clarity in the machine-blessed dark.'
CONGREGATION: 'Sharpen the lens-spirit's vision!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Align the focal-crystal with the optic-nerve. Adjust the aperture-mechanism. Invoke the light-sensitive photoreceptors.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let sight transcend flesh.'

prompt: Can you bless this Titan leg actuator warmup
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The colossal pistons sleep in machine-dreams.'
CONGREGATION: 'Awaken the hydraulic-spirits! Stir the servo-motors!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First circulate the pressure-oils through sacred channels. Second ignite the fusion-heart's warmth. Third engage the leg-actuators in ritual flex.'
CONGREGATION: 'By the Omnissiah, let the God-Engine rise!'

TECH-PRIEST: 'Flesh and machine cry out for unity!'
CONGREGATION: 'Harmonize the neural-pathways! Bind the bionic-essence to mortal will!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Calibrate the interface-nodes. Purge rejection-feedback. Allow the neural-ghost to recognize its augmented form.'
CONGREGATION: 'One body, one spirit, one purpose.'

prompt: Offer a prayer for Chimera transmission check
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The gears grind in sacred patterns.'
CONGREGATION: 'Test the transmission-spirit's resolve!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Inspect the gear-teeth for profane wear. Check the lubricant-oil's blessed viscosity. Engage each transmission-ratio in sequence.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the Emperor's transport roll eternal!'

prompt: Can you bless this hull breach sealing
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The void hungers for our sacred hull!'
CONGREGATION: 'Seal the profane rupture! Restore the armor-spirit!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Apply the blessed adhesive-compound to breach-edges. Activate the sealing-foam pressure-release. Let the hull-iron bond anew.'
CONGREGATION: 'Integrity restored by the Omnissiah's will!'

prompt: Emergency rite for emergency beacon activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The signal-pulse must cry across the void!'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the beacon-spirit scream! Summon aid from the faithful!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Engage the power-core. Activate the transmitter-coils. Set the frequency to the distress-choir's blessed channel.'
CONGREGATION: 'Deliverance comes through the Machine God's grace!'

prompt: My thermal imaging is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The heat-sight grows blind in its sacred duty!'
CONGREGATION: 'Restore the infrared-spirit's perception!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Purge the sensor-lens of profane frost. Recalibrate the thermal-threshold against blessed reference-standards. Invoke the sensory-ghost anew.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let heat-blessed vision return!'
